mission.title: Install and Configure Monocle on Kubernetes
mission.description: Monocle is a framework designed for tracing GenAI app code, allowing developers to easily instrument their applications for observability. Installing Monocle enables you to monitor and trace your GenAI applications in production environments seamlessly.

steps.title: Install Monocle
steps.description:
Install the Monocle tracing package via pip:
```bash
pip install monocle-apptrace
```

steps.title: Instrument your GenAI application
steps.description:
Add two lines to your Python application to enable tracing:
```python
from monocle_apptrace.instrumentor import setup_monocle_telemetry

# In your main function
setup_monocle_telemetry(workflow_name="your-app-name")
```
Monocle automatically detects and traces popular frameworks like LangChain, LlamaIndex, and CrewAI.

steps.title: View traces locally
steps.description:
By default, traces are printed to the console. To export to a file:
```python
from monocle_apptrace.instrumentor import setup_monocle_telemetry
from opentelemetry.sdk.trace.export import BatchSpanProcessor
from opentelemetry.sdk.trace.export import ConsoleSpanExporter

setup_monocle_telemetry(
    workflow_name="your-app-name",
    span_processors=[BatchSpanProcessor(ConsoleSpanExporter())]
)
```

steps.title: Verify installation
steps.description:
```bash
pip show monocle-apptrace
python -c "from monocle_apptrace.instrumentor import setup_monocle_telemetry; print('OK')"
```

resolution.summary: Monocle is installed as a Python package for tracing GenAI applications with OpenTelemetry-compatible output.

troubleshooting.title: Import errors
troubleshooting.description:
Ensure you're using the correct Python version (3.8+):
```bash
python --version
pip install --upgrade monocle-apptrace
```

troubleshooting.title: Traces not appearing
troubleshooting.description: Ensure `setup_monocle_telemetry()` is called before any framework imports (LangChain, etc.).

troubleshooting.title: Framework not automatically detected
troubleshooting.description: Check supported frameworks at https://github.com/monocle2ai/monocle. You may need to add manual instrumentation for unsupported frameworks.

prerequisites.description: Python 3.8+ and pip are required. No Kubernetes cluster needed.
